raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 'Click to Cancel' bill aims to help consumers easily and transparently cancel subscriptions.",
    "The bill protecting homeowners during foreclosure includes provisions to prevent bank foreclosures when owners can recover more by selling.",
    "The bill extending the review period for wage theft complaints aims to ensure victims receive timely resolutions.",
    "The Reservist Financial Support bill allows military reservists to apply for retroactive deferment of payments and interest on specified debts.",
    "The bill supporting foster youth establishes funding programs for affordable housing projects dedicated to current and former foster youth.",
    "The bill eliminating roadblocks for housing development aims to improve fee transparency for housing developers.",
    "The Childcare Access bill provides enhanced support for families experiencing homelessness or domestic violence.",
    "The Healthy Homework Act requires school boards to consider mental health when creating homework guidelines.",
    "The Abortion Access Transparency bill launches a public awareness campaign for reliable abortion information.",
    "The bill addressing nursing shortages separates the teaching credential approval process from hiring to improve confidence in hiring.",
    "The bill increasing transparency for the Department of Veterans Affairs mandates reporting on internal audit findings.",
    "The bill strengthening representation for minority veterans aims to improve eligibility for benefits in underserved communities.",
    "The Crime Survivor Trauma Leave bill allows employees to take sick leave if they or a family member are victims of violence.",
    "The Derogatory Mascot Ban aims to eliminate culturally insensitive school mascots.",
    "The Accessibility bill seeks to increase the number of accessible bathrooms with grab bars in new buildings.",
    "The Transportation Funding Oversight bill requires improved online transparency regarding transportation project investments."
  ]
}
```
